CUS-5019.message: Dear Leo Ford, we’re sorry to let you know that your order ORD-90001 for ELC-1003, currently expected on 2026-07-07, may be delayed due to a temporary stock shortage. We’re actively expediting replenishment and will keep you updated as soon as we have more information. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.
